titleStmt.title: SII 31.70: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 70. (A.R. No. B 204 of 1938.) CHIḌIPRĀLA, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Engraved on the west wall of the kitchen in the Agastyēśvarasvāmi temple.
It is dated Śaka 1446 (8), Vyaya, Bhādrapada, śu. 2. Friday (Śukravāra) corresponding to 10th August 1526 A.D.

Records the gift of 2 khas for maintaining amṛitapaḷḷi and 2 khas for akhaṇḍatiruvaḷika (perpetual lamps) totaling 4 khas of land locally called Pāṇḍavabīdu situated on the western side of the village Gollapalli to the temple of Śrī Agastyēśvara (probably Chiḍipirāla itself) by Chandraśēkharayya for the merit of Śrī Kṛishṇadēvarāya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrījayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakha(ka)varuṣaṁbulu 1446(8) Agunēṭi
veya(vyaya)saṁvatsara bhādrapada śu 2 su(śu)kra śrī Agastēśvaranāṁdhaniki caṁdraśēkharayyavāru ta
tā(dhā)tidhi puṇyakālamaṁdunu gollapaḷliki paḍumara pāṁḍavabīḍu kha 4 Akṣarālānu nālugu
puṭlu cēnunnu kṛṣṇarāyadēvamahārāyalku puṁṇyaṁgānu tadhātidhi puṇyakālamaṁdu
dēvaniki Amṛtavaḷlaku kha 2 nni Akhaṁḍa tiruvaḷikalu kha 2 nni dhāravōsi yistimi Ācaṁdrārkka
stā(sdhā)yigānu dhāravōsi yistimi yī dharmmanaku yavvaru ganaka virōdhiṁccināsu vāraṇāśi lōnu gōvu
nnubrāṁhmaṇininni vadhiṁccina pāpāna bōvuvāru . svadattādvigiṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānu pā
lanaṁ . paradattāpaharēṇa svadattāṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt śrī .
Digital edition of SII 31.70 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
